content.explanation:
**Must — Strong Obligation & Certainty:**

"Must" के 2 main uses हैं:

**Use 1: Strong Obligation (ज़रूरी है)**
🇮🇳 तुम्हें यह ज़रूर करना होगा।
🇬🇧 You **must** do this.

**Use 2: Logical Certainty (निश्चित रूप से)**
🇮🇳 वह ज़रूर थका होगा।
🇬🇧 He **must** be tired.

**Must vs Should vs Have to:**
• Must = internal obligation (मैं खुद महसूस करता हूँ)
• Have to = external obligation (rule/someone says so)
• Should = mild advice

🇮🇳 मुझे exercise करनी ही है। (खुद decide किया)
🇬🇧 I **must** exercise.
rules: Strong obligation: You must submit by Friday.
Certainty: She must be the manager. (logical deduction)
Negative: must not / mustn't = absolutely forbidden
Must not ≠ do not have to (different meaning!)
Must have + V3 = certainty about past: He must have left early.
No past tense of must — use "had to" for past obligation
content.memoryTrick: **MUST = MUST** — इसका Hindi मतलब 'ज़रूर/अवश्य'. Must not = absolutely forbidden (बिल्कुल मत करो). Don't have to = optional hai.

examples.hindi: तुम्हें यह किताब ज़रूर पढ़नी चाहिए।
मुझे कल तक काम खत्म करना ही है।
examples.english: I must finish the work by tomorrow.
You must not make noise here.

examples.hindi: आपका passport valid होना ज़रूरी है।

mistakes.why: Must not के बाद base verb

speakingTips: Health advice: 'You must drink 8 glasses of water daily.'
Rules: 'You must wear a helmet while riding.'
Certainty: 'This must be the right answer.'

vocabulary.example: She must be certain about this.

practice.hindi: मुझे कल तक यह खत्म करना है।
practice.english: I must finish this by tomorrow.
alternatives: i have to finish this by tomorrow.

practice.english: You must not make noise here.

practice.hindi: हमें rule follow करना ही है।
alternatives: we have to follow the rules.
you have to carry your passport.

practice.hindi: मुझे यह decision लेना ही है।
alternatives: i have to make this decision.

practice.hindi: क्या उसे अभी जाना ज़रूरी है?
alternatives: does she have to leave now?

practice.hindi: तुम्हें यह form भरना ही है।
alternatives: you have to complete this form.

practice.hindi: हमें deadline meet करनी ही है।
alternatives: we have to stick to the deadline.

practice.hindi: तुम्हें कभी झूठ नहीं बोलना चाहिए।
alternatives: you should never tell a lie.

practice.hindi: Students को uniform पहननी ज़रूरी है।
वे ज़रूर वहाँ पहुँच चुके होंगे।
हमें environment protect करना ज़रूरी है।
alternatives: we have to save the environment.

practice.hindi: यह ज़रूर किसी गलतफहमी की वजह से हुआ होगा।
practice.english: This must have happened due to a misunderstanding.
alternatives: this was surely caused by a misunderstanding.

practice.hindi: क्या हमें अभी decide करना ज़रूरी है?
alternatives: do we have to decide immediately?

practice.hindi: तुम्हें अपनी health का ख्याल रखना ज़रूरी है।
practice.english: You must take care of your health.
alternatives: you have to look after your health.
practice.hint: must + take care of your health

practice.hindi: हमें अपने goals के लिए ज़रूर काम करना है।
practice.english: We must work towards our goals.
alternatives: we have to strive for our goals.

alternatives: i have to finish this by tomorrow.
